{{Infobox character
| name = Helgard Incarnation
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| abilities = tear open a Gate, created a layer of frost
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Helgard]] [[Incarnation]] is a powerful, highly intelligent being characterized by blue skin, spiral horns, and curly white hair. Her eyes are described as icy with a blue-green internal light. She possesses significant elemental control, capable of summoning blizzards and manipulating ice to fight autonomously, even while she focuses on other tasks such as reattaching a severed hand. She is accompanied by a pack of white, furry creatures and has been seen working alongside a one-eyed giant. The [[Incarnation]] is an embodiment of a specific [[Territory]] and has the ability to enter Ragnarus, an event that suggests escalating danger. She displays a sophisticated and curious personality, expressing interest in the abilities of others and claiming to possess great erudition. During confrontations, she has interacted with [[Simon]], son of [[Kalman]], and the [[Valinhall]] girl.}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Helgard]] [[Incarnation]] is a being characterized by blue skin, curly white hair, spiral horns, and glacial eyes. This entity is capable of engaging in intelligible conversations, though it once uttered the word 'Ragnarus' in a grating voice. During its appearance at the gates of [[Cana]], it was positioned behind [[Zakareth]] and demonstrated the ability to tear open a Gate amidst swirling red light. In combat, it produced a layer of frost and sustained a strike from [[Simon]]'s blade that passed through its wrist.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Helgard Incarnation]] can tear open a Gate in a flash of swirling red light.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3">''City of Light'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Helgard Incarnation]] spoke the word 'Ragnarus' with a grating voice.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Helgard Incarnation]] was behind [[Zakareth]] at the gates of [[Cana]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Helgard Incarnation]] has curly white hair, spiral horns, blue skin, and glacial eyes.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Helgard Incarnation]] is capable of carrying on intelligible conversations.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]]'s blade passed through the [[Helgard Incarnation]]’s wrist.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Helgard Incarnation]] created a layer of frost.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|"Ragnarus," she said, her voice grating audibly.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
